entries.title: Jabba Rescue Is Layered Infiltration

content.fact: The rescue of Han uses staged arrivals, deception, bargaining, and hidden assets rather than a single frontal assault.
content.injection: During the Jabba sequence, let the heroes’ plan unfold in layers; apparent capture can still be part of the operation.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Jabba Rescue Sequence.
Respect story-position bounds from Return of the Jedi Opening to Dagobah Revelations.

entries.title: Emperor Defeated, Empire Not Instantly Gone

content.injection: After Endor, the Emperor’s defeat does not make the galaxy instantly peaceful or uniformly New Republic-controlled; preserve Imperial remnants, local power struggles, and postwar instability.
